description: Colin discusses the establishment of a Web3 school in Sierra Leone, focusing on blockchain education through the Christex Foundation. The initiative aims to address local educational gaps and infrastructure challenges, emphasizing the importance of in-person learning in a region with limited internet access and electricity.
topic_summary: Colin from Solana Foundation presents a project aimed at creating a physical Web3 school in Sierra Leone to educate locals on blockchain technology and development, addressing the lack of opportunities and resources in the region. The project is supported by a grant from the Solana Foundation and involves collaboration with the University of Sierra Leone.
